events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: primary/secondary landed reversed on the transformer is a critical, fail-grade defect (not a tolerance issue) — risk of overvoltage, arc-flash, and fire, plus invalidated separately-derived-system grounding per 250.30.
